title: colysis christovalensis
intro: Colysis christovalensis, also known as the Philippine tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Colysis christovalensis involve the use of its rhizome and leaves in traditional medicine, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use as a natural remedy for wound healing. Colysis christovalensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and rhizome in hot water, or it can be used in the form of a topical ointment or cream.
